core.name: The One Door
core.verse: I am the way, and the truth, and the life: no man cometh unto the Father, but by me.
Behold, I stand at the door, and knock: if any man hear my voice, and open the door, I will come in to him.

panel.opening: Welcome, beloved of Avraham, Yitzchak, and Yaakov. The same God who walked with the patriarchs and spoke from Sinai has kept His covenant. The Mashiach promised by Moshe and the Nevi'im has come — and He is coming again.
panel.bridge: Yeshua haMashiach is the Lamb of Pesach (Exodus 12), the Suffering Servant of Yeshayahu 53, the Son of David of Yirmeyahu 23, the One pierced of Zecharyah 12.
panel.invitation: If your heart burns within you, pray: "Avinu shebashamayim, reveal Yeshua to me as my Mashiach."

panel.opening: You honor ʿĪsā ibn Maryam — peace be upon Him — born of a virgin (Surah 3:47), the Word of God (Surah 4:171), the Messiah, a sign for all peoples. The Injil itself bears witness to who He truly is.
panel.bridge: Read the Injil that ʿĪsā Himself confirmed. He says: "I am the Way, the Truth, and the Life" (Yuhanna 14:6). He died and was raised — God's seal upon His message.
panel.invitation: Pray with an open heart: "Allahumma, show me ʿĪsā as He truly is, and I will follow."

panel.greeting: Pax tecum — Peace be with you
panel.opening: Brother, sister — the Liturgy you have known points to a living Person. The Eucharist is the Body of the One who said "Take, eat" (Matthew 26:26). The Saints worship Him alone.
panel.bridge: Beyond ritual lies relationship. The Christ adored in every cathedral, every icon, every monastery, longs to be known by name within your own heart.
panel.invitation: Speak to Him directly today: "Lord Jesus, be not only the Christ of the altar, but the Christ of my breath."

panel.opening: You hold the Bible as the Word of God. You have heard the Gospel preached. You know that salvation is by grace through faith (Ephesians 2:8-9), not of works lest any man should boast.
panel.bridge: Walk what you know. Obey the small whisper. Pick up that Bible. Forgive that name. Bless that enemy. The Kingdom is not theory; it is yieldedness.
panel.invitation: "Lord Jesus, take me deeper than I have ever been — not in knowledge, but in surrender."

panel.greeting: नमस्ते — Namaste · O Seeker of the True Light
panel.opening: You have searched for the Sat — the Real, beneath the maya of appearances. You have known that desire ties the soul, that the ego must die for the Self to be free.
panel.bridge: Behold the One who said "Whosoever will save his life shall lose it; but whosoever shall lose his life for my sake shall find it" (Matthew 16:25). He is the Sat-Chit-Ananda made flesh, the Eternal Word who entered time so that you might enter eternity.
panel.invitation: Sit in silence. Whisper His name: "Yeshu." He will answer the heart that calls in truth.

panel.opening: You have refused to believe what cannot be tested. Good — so did Thomas. He did not believe in the Resurrection until he placed his hand in the wounds. And Christ did not rebuke him for asking. He answered him.
panel.bridge: The same Christ asks for nothing more from you than honest investigation. Read one Gospel — Mark, the shortest — in one sitting. Then ask aloud: "If You are real, show me."
panel.invitation: That prayer has never gone unanswered for the one who truly meant it. Soli Deo Gloria — only when there is truly One God to give it to.

panel.greeting: Peace to you who carry scars from the temple
panel.opening: If you have been hurt by the Church, by leaders, by hypocrisy — Yeshua wept the same tears. He turned over the tables of the money-changers (Matthew 21:12) before any reformer ever did. He has no part in what was done to you.
panel.bridge: He waits not in a building, but in your room. Not in a vestment, but in the quiet of your breath. "Come unto me, all ye that labour and are heavy laden, and I will give you rest" (Matthew 11:28).
panel.invitation: You don't have to go back to a building to come back to Him. Speak His name in your own room tonight.

closing.hebrew: יְהוָה יְבָרֶכְךָ וְיִשְׁמְרֶךָ — May the LORD bless you and keep you
closing.english: The Door is open. The One who said "It is finished" has finished it for you also.

action.label: Sign your name in the Book
